name: Cursed Fire King Doom Burst
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>呪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> バースト・カースド
desc: If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses 400 ATK until the end of this turn. You can only use each of the following effects of "Cursed Fire King Doom Burst" once per turn. If you control a Fiend Tuner: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses 600 ATK until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses 400 ATK until the end of this turn. You can only use each of the following effects of "Cursed Fire King Doom Burst" once per turn. If you control a Fiend Tuner: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses 600 ATK until the end of this turn.
eff: If this card is destroyed by battle or card effect and sent to the GY: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses 400 ATK until the end of this turn. You can only use each of the following effects of "Cursed Fire King Doom Burst" once per turn. If you control a Fiend Tuner: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses 600 ATK until the end of this turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
